creator: gshapiro@FreeBSD.org
text: There was a regression in 8.17.1 for continuation lines in aliases files, fixed in 8.17.2 (and 8.18.1, part of 13.3-BETA3).  I'm going to assume that is what you are hitting.  Since it has been fixed, you can either upgrade (using the sendmail port or go to 13.3-BETA3) or avoid continuation lines in 8.17.1.
